overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting Victorian London. A character in a top hat and long coat walks along the foggy Thames embankment at dusk, with views of the Houses of Parliament and Big Ben. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with blue-toned lighting and gas street lamps illuminating the wet stone pavement.

events.description: game displays location discovery marker for 'THE THAMES' in the upper right corner

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the foggy Thames embankment, passing ornate Victorian lamp posts and looking toward the distant city skyline

entered.detail: tall stone balustrade wall with decorative pillars separating the walkway from the river
ornate black cast iron street lamp with warm glowing light
wide river covered in fog with industrial structures visible through the mist
silhouette of Victorian London buildings and smokestacks against the blue dusk sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the wet stone embankment of the Thames at dusk. Victorian lamp posts line the path, casting warm light on the foggy river to the right. The distant city skyline is visible through the haze, with industrial smoke rising in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: Riverside overlook with panoramic view of Parliament

events.description: character climbs up onto the top of the embankment wall to get a better view
camera pans left to reveal the Houses of Parliament and Big Ben across the Thames

agents.ego_description: stands atop the embankment wall surveying the panoramic view of the Thames, Parliament buildings, and the moon rising through the clouds

entered.detail: massive Gothic Revival palace with illuminated windows and multiple spires
tall Gothic clock tower with pointed spire silhouetted against the moonlit sky
large vessels with smokestacks moored on the foggy river
full moon visible through scattered clouds above the Parliament buildings

segments.scene_description: The character climbs onto the embankment wall, revealing a breathtaking panoramic view of the Thames. The camera pans across the foggy river to showcase the illuminated Houses of Parliament and Big Ben, with the moon visible through the clouds. Steamships are moored on the water below.

events.description: character jumps down from the wall and resumes walking along the embankment
horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right side of the path

agents.ego_description: descends from the wall and continues walking along the embankment, sharing the path with horse-drawn carriages and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage with driver moving along the embankment road, passing the character

entered.detail: tall stone balustrade wall returning to the left side of the path
ornate cast iron street lamp continuing the line along the walkway

segments.scene_description: The character descends from the wall and resumes walking along the Thames embankment. A horse-drawn carriage passes by on the right, and the character continues past the line of Victorian lamp posts. The stone wall runs along the left side, with the foggy river visible beyond.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a moody Victorian embankment that briefly ascends to a panoramic vista before returning to the street level. It begins with the character walking along wet stone pavement lined with glowing lamp posts, while industrial smoke rises into the foggy dusk over the river. As the character climbs onto the embankment wall, the perspective expands into a wide view of the Thames, revealing the illuminated Houses of Parliament and Big Ben under a clouded moon and moored steamships. The scene then shifts as the character descends from the wall to resume their journey, passing a horse-drawn carriage on the right. Finally, the camera follows the character back along the line of Victorian lamps with the foggy river remaining visible beyond the stone wall.
